pattern: Each root-to-leaf path spells a number digit by digit; carry the running number down and add up the leaf values.
hints: Treat the values along a path as digits of a base-ten number, most significant at the root.
Pass the number built so far into each child as running*10 + node.val, instead of storing whole paths.
At a leaf, the running number is one term of the total; sum the contributions from every leaf.

edge_inputs.description: single node is its own number
leading-zero-looking path still uses positional value (0 then 9 -> 9)
left-skewed chain spells one long number

stress.note: values are single digits per the constraint
